cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Docaware — an offline document assistant for African SMEs: digitize photographed/scanned paperwork into clean, downloadable documents, and hold a memory-aware conversation that answers questions across a local library of reports, contracts, and notes with page-level citations — entirely on a low-cost 8 GB laptop with no internet.

test_prompts.prompt: Draft a concise, professional email to a supplier requesting a 14-day extension on payment of invoice #4521 due to a temporary cash-flow delay, and propose paying 40% now with the balance in two weeks.

Summarize the following meeting notes into key decisions, owners, and deadlines:

The team reviewed the Q3 product launch. Marketing (Ada) will finalize the campaign by Aug 10. Sales (Kofi) flagged that pricing is still unconfirmed; finance will decide by Aug 5. A risk was raised that the vendor's delivery may slip by two weeks.
